content.title: Welcome to BlackBerry Cluster!
content.text:
<TextStyle.LightBlue><TextStyle.LightBlue>🌴 Welcome to BLACKBERRY ASA Server 🌴</></>

<RichColor Color="1,0.9,0,1"><RichColor Color="1,0.9,0,1">Survive. Build. Dominate.</></>

<TextStyle.White><TextStyle.White>Welcome survivor! We are glad to see you on our server.</></>
<TextStyle.White><TextStyle.White>Build your tribe, explore the map and become the strongest.</></>

<RichColor Color="0,1,0,1"><RichColor Color="0,1,0,1">Server Features:</></>
<TextStyle.White><TextStyle.White>• Active administration</></>
<TextStyle.White><TextStyle.White>• Balanced gameplay</></>
<TextStyle.White><TextStyle.White>• Events and rewards</></>
<TextStyle.White><TextStyle.White>• Friendly community</></>

<RichColor Color="1,0.5,0,1"><RichColor Color="1,0.5,0,1">Important Rules:</></>
<TextStyle.White><TextStyle.White>• Respect other players</></>
<TextStyle.White><TextStyle.White>• No cheats or exploits</></>
<TextStyle.White><TextStyle.White>• Follow admin instructions</></>

<RichColor Color="0,0.8,1,1"><RichColor Color="0,0.8,1,1">Useful Links:</></>
<TextStyle.LightBlue><TextStyle.LightBlue>🌐 Website: blackberry.survivalshop.org</></>
<TextStyle.LightBlue><TextStyle.LightBlue>💎 Donate Shop: blackberry.survivalshop.org/shop</></>

<RichColor Color="1,0.3,0.3,1"><RichColor Color="1,0.3,0.3,1">Good luck survivor!</></>
<TextStyle.White><TextStyle.White>The adventure begins now...</></>
